name: Claw-Swarm V5.0
description: 蜂群智能协作引擎 — Swarm intelligence engine with 6-layer architecture: bio-inspired multi-agent orchestration, pheromone communication, memory systems, quality governance, and real-time monitoring dashboard

dbPath.description: Path to the SQLite database file. If omitted, defaults to <dataDir>/claw-swarm.db

pheromone.description: Pheromone engine settings (MMAS bounds, decay rate, etc.)

memory.description: Memory system settings (working memory buffer sizes, etc.)

orchestration.description: Orchestration layer settings (quality gates, pipeline breaker, etc.)
